Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows how effective the drop shot can be on Bass during the extreme heat of Summer.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | When its Hot... Drop Shot!.mp4
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join the FishON! TV crew as we tackle rugged Northern Ontario terrain with our Polaris Ranger equipped with a custom boat rack. This remote expedition takes us deep into the wilderness to an untouched lake known for its walleye bounty. From the adrenaline of the journey to the thrill of the catch, this episode is packed with adventure, stunning scenery, and fishing tips you won’t want to miss!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Trailblazing to Trophy Walleye: Polaris Ranger Adventure
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jimmy is fishing in Rockport Texas with Baseball Buddies, Trapped redfish in low tide.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Outdoors | Trapped Refish
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jimmy is fishing for smallmouth in the St Lawrence River.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Outdoors | Upstate smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing Caney Lake in Louisiana.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Outdoors | Windy and hot
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Cane Pole fishing for crappie and bass.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Outdoors | Lake Ivie
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Pro Angler Chuck Stratton is fishing with Jimmy.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Outdoors | Fishing with chuck
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jimmy is fishing with Professional angler Edwin Evers in Oklahoma.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Outdoors | Bass Pros
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.grandparentTitle: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al Lindner and Jeff Klozinski spend the day tracking down postspawn smallmouth.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Finding Transitional Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hobie Outdoor Adventures flies down to the southernmost country of Central America, the Republic of Panama, and heads to a secluded coast with a lush rainforest coastline, where the only way to fish is from a kayak.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hobie Fishing - Panama, Part 1
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hobie Outdoor Adventures goes to Austin, Texas for some bass fishing and then to the BassMaster Classic for insight into the Hobie product line. And finally, we spend some time on the water with the Hobie Pro Angler.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hobie Fishing — Austin, Texas Bass Fishing & the Hobie Pro Angler
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hobie Outdoor Adventures heads to Mexico's Baja peninsula looking for giant rooster fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hobie Fishing — Baja Mexico
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hobie Outdoor Adventures heads to the Boston area for some striper fishing before going to ICAST for a new product feature from Hobie Kayaks. Finally, you'll learn more about what's ahead in our adventures.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hobie Outdoor Adventure - Stripers and More
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Paul and Perry kick off an adventurous journey down the Ivanhoe River, heading toward a lake that’s known to deliver steady walleye action. But this time, the fish had other plans. With walleye proving tough to track down, the duo turns to the river’s reliable residents—Northern Pike—to keep the rods bending and the spirits high. Surrounded by stunning scenery, flowing rapids, and beautiful waterfalls, this river run becomes more than just a fishing trip—it’s a reminder that the North’s wild beauty always makes the day worthwhile, no matter what’s biting.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | River Run Redemption

Video.summary: It's late June and right now it's primetime for hot river fishing across the Upper Midwest for a variety of different reasons. Number one would be the low stable flows of the rivers, most of the rivers are also running fairly clear. Number two is it puts fish in fairly identifiable areas in the river thanks to the current. Today's guests is Captain Ben Wolfe of Sport Fish Michigan who targets a wide variety of fish throughout the river systems of Michigan.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Summer Midwest Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shaw teaches an in-depth course on fishing crankbaits in and around weeds.
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast — Crankbait Bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week on larry smith we head north to lake superior in search of some big ole lakers! Stay Tuned!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Superior Lake Trout
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro Vs Joe - Fishing giant bass at Camelot Bell
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In Episode 3, we navigate the serene waters of the Ivanhoe River, embracing the beauty of spring as we target post-spawn walleye. With rods in hand, we explore the river's productive fishing spots, uncovering the best techniques and tips for a successful catch in this transitional season. From scenic backdrops to thrilling strikes, this episode captures the essence of spring fishing at its finest.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Spring on the Ivanhoe: Post-Spawn Walleye Adventures
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We saved the best for last. Part three of our Cedros adventure has fantastic fishing for three different species. Big Yellowtail in the morning, Epic calico bass at the famous Chesters rock during the afternoon, and some epic kelp paddy Dorado fishing on the way home.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Cedros Island Adventure, Part Three
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Experience Fishing in beautiful Algoma Country with young anglers learning about Bass fishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Bass For Youth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al and James Lindner use the new Rapala PXR Mavrik 110 Jerkbait to catch both smallmouth and walleyes.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Multispecies Mavriks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Local guide, Marcel Veenstra accompanies Kim to Indian River, Michigan for giant smallmouths. The fall feed is on and Strike King's "Tour Grade Titanium Umbrella Rig" pays off in a big way.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Gorillas on a Chandelier
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this episode we pass on the angling tradition to the next generation with some Louisiana bass.
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Passing the Tradition
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Young Female Anglers participate in the regional Angler Young Angler Tournament
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Young Anglers Tournament
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: One of the best trips on the planet is fishing for Peacock Bass in the Amazon River "aka The Rio Negro." Fishing on the Blackwater Explorer with Acute Angling is a real bucket list trip. Shea McIntee and the crew spend a full day fishing for some of the hardest fighting bass.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Fishing For Monster Amazon Peacock Bass, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jarrett and his guest tournament angler Kip Bennett fish the clear waters of Lake Powell for a variety of multi species angling
Video.grandparentTitle: Jarrett Edwards Outdoors — The More Species the Better
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman’s Pro Vs Joe Sophomore Jinx1
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro Vs Joe - Sophomore Jinx
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Going camping and trout fishing in the Sierras is one of our favorite things to do. For the first time, Shea McIntee and the crew head down to South Lake Bishop. What makes this trip unique is that we get to fish with some good friends.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - An Unforgettable Trip, South Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Ice Fishing is here! This week, we're heading north on the hunt for solid ice! We'll be meeting up with our friends from Eskimo, Bite Me Box, and Beavertail baits to catch some perch!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors — Early Ice Perch

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors — Early Ice Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors — Early Ice Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors — Early Ice Perch

Video.summary: Jim reviews how to build your own bladed jig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building a Bladed Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin shows the best spots and baits for bass during the shad spawn.
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Early Summer Feed
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows you, in detail how to build your own Ned Rig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building A Ned Rig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Today on Stoked On Fishing, we head offshore on the Stoked On Fishing Charters 35-foot Everglades with an All-Star crew searching for bluefin tuna. We take out Okuma Fishing Tackles President Doug and John, head of product development. We also have on board Colin and his wife, Amanda from Grundens, and our friend Toby from Mag Bay Lures and Mag Bay Resort down in Baja, Mexico. This trip was absolutely nuts, with the best Blue Fin Tuna fishing we have seen in Sothern California all year.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Southern California Bluefin Tuna Fishing at Its Finest
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin fishes a finesse topwater bait for bass in Early Summer
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Tiny Topwater Fun
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join the Stoked on Fishing crew as they travel to incredible fishing destinations, chase down a wide variety of species, and share the stories of the people and places behind each catch. Whether it’s offshore, inshore, freshwater, or somewhere off the beaten path, every episode brings you along for the adventure — with real anglers, real conditions, and no scripted nonsense.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat Fishing on the Ranger 85 (Part 3)
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing can be very high-tech, but on the other end of the spectrum, it can actually be very simple. Today we're going to show you some presentations and tactics to put fish in the boat....easily!
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Easy Fishing Tactics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On today's episode of AnglingBuzz TV, we're talking all about finding walleye and how to catch them! Our special guest is Jason Freed who's a fishing guide on Minnesota's famous Leech Lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Finding Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks fishing, old school lures and more with longtime Pro angler John Murray.
Video.grandparentTitle: Slickfish Radio | Pro Angler John Murray
Video.title: Episode 1
